1.title: Eden Space
1.query:
timeseries used = avg(dt.runtime.jvm.memory_pool.used),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance, rx_pid, poolname }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(used) desc
| limit 20
